title: ochna subscandens
intro: Ochna subscandens, also known as the small-leaved Ochna, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Ochna subscandens are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, providing several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
